allowed_scope: 50 symbols; 24 feature dates; 6 formulas; 7200 rows; existing feature_hashes only.
disallowed_scope: Any new symbols, new dates, new formulas, external inputs, or raw-data refetch.

protocol_requirement: Use purged/embargo split placeholders before execution.
allowed_scope: Define date-grouped split identifiers and no-label-join rules.
disallowed_scope: Random row split, OOS rerun, post-cutoff leakage, or live-review use.

protocol_requirement: Future experiment may test pipeline mechanics only if a separate execution gate allows it.
allowed_scope: At most one simple paper-only baseline learner or blocked no-train report in future gate.
disallowed_scope: Model selection, hyperparameter sweep, formula ranking, promotion, or production scoring.

protocol_requirement: Metrics must not imply selection without data-snooping controls.
allowed_scope: Allowed future outputs: row counts, missingness, leakage checks, fit status if separately allowed.
disallowed_scope: Sharpe, Deflated Sharpe, PnL ranking, candidate comparison, buy/sell recommendations.
notes: Performance metrics are blocked in protocol design.

protocol_requirement: Experiment must not affect production or protected candidate.
allowed_scope: paper-only report artifacts only; no orders; no broker; no plan regeneration.
disallowed_scope: Any production readiness change, broker work, real order, or protected candidate change.

protocol_requirement: Protocol must prepare future gate without executing experiment.
allowed_scope: A future POST checkpoint may execute a tiny experiment gate, then only if safety fields remain false.
disallowed_scope: Any direct experiment execution in POST-03.
